behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names the file components/slider/index.tsx, the onInternalChangeComplete function, the // @ts-ignore comment, as any pattern, and restProps spread — all assertions in tests map to these.

no_solution_leakage.reason: instruction describes what's broken (ts-ignore, as any, restProps spread) without prescribing the exact replacement code.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests only check absence of @ts-ignore and as any, presence of restProps, and that tsc/lint/tests pass — multiple valid type-narrowing approaches would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run tsc, eslint, biome, and jest via subprocess to verify behavior beyond text grep.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub would fail tsc compilation and jest tests; removing restProps entirely would fail test_restprops_type_narrowing.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All required behaviors (no ts-ignore, no as any, tsc/lint/tests pass) are covered by tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are individually named with docstrings explaining origin and purpose.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: File path is necessary context; instruction doesn't point at exact line numbers of the fix.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not a config edit.
